get.description: Aggregates tag suggestions from every source bound to a work.

post.description: Creates a MediaWork from a source with user-chosen metadata and tags.
Approve a pending or flagged work, making it active.
Record that a user reviewed a work and chose not to approve it.
Immediate resolution by staff - same as expiry, skips the waiting period.
Flag an active work for re-review.
Appeal an unapproved work to send it back to the mod queue.

get.description: List works pending moderation: pending, flagged, or appealed.

post.description:
Creates or retrieves a source from a URL.

- If the source already has a work, returns work_id (redirect to work page).
- If work_id is provided, binds the source to that work.
- Otherwise, returns source_id for the user to review and create a work.

get.description: Returns tag suggestions derived from a source's info_payload.

post.description: Reject a pending source on an existing work. Unbinds the source.
Approve a pending source on an existing work.

get.description: List sources with pagination, filterable by user, binding, and pending status.

post.description:
Rollback changes of a specific revision.

If entity is not provided: rollback all changes made IN the specified revision.
If entity is provided: rollback that entity TO its state at the specified revision.
Rollback all changes made by a specific user since the given date.

PendingModerationEventSchema.description: Thin view of a pending flag or appeal exposed on a work.
PendingModerationEventSchema.title: PendingModerationEventSchema
